description_long: This object is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a giant panda, featuring the characteristic black and white coloration of the species. The toy has a rounded body with a white belly and face, black arms, legs, and ears, and black patches around the eyes. Its arms are positioned in front of its body, as if it is holding or hugging itself, giving it a gentle and endearing appearance. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of plush toys, with visible seams indicating fabric construction. The toy is compact and likely filled with a lightweight, compressible material such as polyester fiberfill. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the exterior.
description: A soft, plush panda stuffed toy with black and white fur, sitting with its arms in front of its body. The toy has a gentle, endearing appearance and a matte, fabric surface.
description_view_0: The panda is seen from a front angle, showing its face, black eye patches, and both arms held in front of its body.
description_view_1: The back of the panda is visible, highlighting the black fur on its back and the rounded shape of its body.
description_view_2: A rear three-quarter view, showing the curve of the panda's back and the transition between black and white fur.
description_view_3: A side view of the panda, displaying the profile of its face, one ear, and the arm position in front of its body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with black oval eyes and no visible mouth, giving it a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is sitting with its arms held in front of its body, head slightly tilted downward, and legs tucked underneath.
